notes: Built on v4.3.156 confusing-bolete cleanup package.
Cleaned vague Wikimedia image metadata from four visible bolete records by keeping one worker-verified open-license image per record.
Removed unverified extra images from Phylloporus leucomycelinus, Phylloporus rhodoxanthus, Austroboletus gracilis, and Harrya chromapes.
Suppressed all current Aureoboletus innixus visible images pending exact author/license verification.
